sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112988" key="xaleph/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλεπ-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, poet. for <sense id="n112988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χαλεπός, ἄεθλον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0255.tlg001:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mimn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
